description: The gate a change must pass before it is considered production-ready. The review agent checks these and the human confirms.

checklist.item: Types pass, lint clean, formatter applied, pre-commit green
checklist.pass_when: all static checks pass in CI, not just locally

checklist.item: Tests exist on the critical paths and actually run green
checklist.pass_when: the suite runs in the sandbox and covers the flagged edge/failure modes

checklist.item: Secrets in env/vault, input validated, authn/authz where needed, dependencies scanned
checklist.pass_when: no secret in code/logs, no unvalidated external input, no known-vulnerable dependency

checklist.item: Migrations versioned, backups with a TESTED restore, idempotency where retries can happen
checklist.pass_when: restore was actually tested; repeated operations are safe

checklist.item: Structured logging, metrics, alerts, tracing of each agent step
checklist.pass_when: a failure can be diagnosed from logs/traces alone

checklist.item: CI/CD pipeline, reproducible infra, rollback under a minute
checklist.pass_when: a bad deploy can be reverted quickly and reproducibly

release_policy: BLOCK release if any P3 (security) or P2 (tests) item fails; REQUEST_CHANGES for others.
